steps.title: Group the repeated expression
steps.content:
The expression $2x+11$ appears twice. Subtract $4(2x+11)$ from both sides to leave only one copy of that repeated expression:
$$6(2x+11)-4(2x+11)=86$$
$$2(2x+11)=86$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $2$:
$$2x+11=43$$
The answer is B.
